== Notes for [[Item:Q99660|Q99660]] ==

Gaon of Sura.

* [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sura_Academy Sura Academy.]
* [http://www.jewishencyclopedia.com/articles/6511-gaon "Gaon" (plural, Geonim).]
* [http://www.jewishencyclopedia.com/articles/710-academies-in-babylonia Jewish Academies in Babylonia.]

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD7D98321EFBBFA9822EF79916C9D2D
geni:6000000000804408308

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
